title: Powerful 2200W Premium Garment Steamer with 3L Water Tank, Dual Steam Settings for Rapid Wrinkle Release, Suitable for All Fabrics Including Delicates, Updated Design, Fridja f1200 Clothes Steamer Pro
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: ELITE 2200W STEAM POWER OUTPUT - Experience unmatched garment care with Fridja's advanced 2200-watt powerful steam output. This high-efficiency steamer heats up in just 35 seconds, delivering rapid results and saving you valuable time. Perfect for both personal and professional use, it provides a robust, continuous steam flow that effortlessly smooths out creases.

DUAL STEAM SETTINGS & VERSATILE USE - Customise your fabric care with dual steam settings tailored for different materials. From delicate silks to sturdy cottons, the Fridja steamer ensures optimal results without the risk of damage. Its versatile design is also suitable for refreshing upholstery, drapes, and bedding, sanitising them while removing odours and allergens.

PREMIUM DESIGN WITH HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS - Crafted with the finest materials, the Fridja steamer boasts a screwless stainless steel steam panel, ensuring durability and ease of maintenance. The robust construction features a sturdy, adjustable telescopic pole made from premium stainless steel, accommodating a wide range of garment lengths.

ENHANCED MOBILITY WITH STURDY WHEELS - Designed for ease of movement, the steamer features smooth, durable wheels that enable effortless transportation around your home or retail space. Whether it's moving from room to room or adjusting to different workstation needs, manoeuvrability is a breeze.

LARGE 3-LITRE WATER TANK FOR EXTENDED USE - Tackle more garments in a single session with the large-capacity water tank. Holding up to 3 litres of water, it provides prolonged steam time, reducing the need for refills and making it ideal for heavy-duty use in busy environments or for large families.

COMPREHENSIVE ACCESSORIES PACKAGE - The Fridja steamer comes with a complete set of accessories to enhance your steaming experience, including a heatproof glove, an upholstery brush, and adjustable hangers. These tools help streamline the steaming process and ensure you have everything you need for any garment type.

FLEXIBLE FABRIC IRONING BOARD & COOL TOUCH HOSE - The flexible fabric ironing board adapts to your garments for precise steaming. In contrast, the cool-touch woven fabric steam hose ensures safety and comfort during use, preventing accidental burns.

EFFORTLESS SANITISING & DEODORISING - The steamer does more than remove creases; it also sanitises fabrics, killing up to 99.9% of bacteria and dust mites. This feature is especially beneficial for homes with pets or allergies, providing a healthier living environment.

ECO-FRIENDLY AND SAFE ON MULTIPLE FABRICS - Safely steam a wide range of fabrics, including silk, velvet, wool, cotton, linen, and nylon. The eco-friendly design of the steamer ensures that you are using less energy compared to a traditional iron, making it a greener choice for your household.

MODERN AESTHETIC IN TWO COLOUR OPTIONS - Available in matte black or off white, the Fridja steamer adds a touch of contemporary elegance to any décor. Its sleek design not only looks great but also blends seamlessly into professional or home settings, enhancing the aesthetic of your space.

Effortless Wrinkle Removal with a Powerful Steamer Merchant video Discover the f1200 Clothes Steamer Pro, featuring a powerful 2200W heater, 35-second heat-up, and dual steam settings. Perfect for refreshing clothes, curtains, bedding, and upholstery, it removes wrinkles efficiently. With a 3L tank and smooth mobility, it’s ideal for home or commercial use. Fabric Care with the f1200 Clothes Steamer Pro Effortlessly Remove Wrinkles at Home The f1200 Clothes Steamer Pro delivers 2200W of powerful steam for fast and effective wrinkle removal. Its dual steam settings make it perfect for delicate fabrics like silk and effective on heavier textiles like wool. Refresh shirts, curtains, and bedding easily with professional results. Perfect for All Fabrics and Occasions Whether for wedding dresses, formal wear, or daily garments, the f1200 handles it all. Its 3L water tank provides up to 100 minutes of continuous steam, making it ideal for events or daily use. Designed for gentle care and powerful wrinkle removal, it protects fabrics while keeping them fresh. Garment Care with the f1200 Clothes Steamer Pro Rapid, Consistent, Professional Results With 2200W of heating power, the f1200 heats up in just 35 seconds, delivering continuous steam for up to 90 minutes. Its large 3L tank handles clothes, curtains, bedding, and upholstery effortlessly. Designed for wrinkle removal and sanitizing fabrics, it’s perfect for home or professional use. Designed for All Fabrics and Settings Featuring dual steam settings, the f1200 is safe for delicate materials like silk and effective on thick fabrics like linen and denim. Its telescopic pole and rolling wheels ensure flexibility and mobility. From everyday garments to upholstery, it ensures fresh, wrinkle-free results with ease. Effortless Wrinkle Removal for All Fabrics at Home Perfect for Daily Garment Care The f1200’s powerful 2200W heater ensures a quick 35-second heat-up, making wrinkle removal fast and efficient. Refresh shirts, trousers, and dresses effortlessly while removing odours. Dual steam settings provide gentle care for delicates and strong results for thicker fabrics like wool and linen. Versatile for All Fabric Types Perfect for delicate items like chiffon or silk and heavy materials like jackets and upholstery, the f1200 adapts to all fabric needs. With dual steam settings and 100 minutes of steam time, it provides professional-level results for daily garments, or home textiles like curtains and bedding. Comprehensive Accessories for Every Task Hanger and Clothes Pegs The f1200’s integrated hanger, ironing board, and sturdy hooks ensure garments stay in place for optimal wrinkle removal and smooth results. Durable Screwless Steam Panel A rust-resistant, screwless stainless steel panel ensures even steam distribution and durability for professional-grade garment care. Safety Glove, Upholstery Brush The heatproof glove ensures safe steaming, while the upholstery brush removes pet hair, dust, and lint, keeping fabrics clean and refreshed. Height-Adjustable Pole The stainless steel telescopic pole adjusts from 90cm to 170cm, accommodating all garment sizes and making storage simple and efficient. Powerful 2200W Heater The f1200 Clothes Steamer Pro features a powerful 2200W heater that generates steam in just 35 seconds. This rapid heat-up time is perfect for quick garment touch-ups or tackling large loads. It delivers consistent, penetrating steam for wrinkle removal on all fabrics, including delicate silk and heavy linen. Whether steaming clothes, curtains, or bedding, this high-performance heater ensures professional results for both home and light commercial use, saving you time and effort. Large 3L Water Tank Equipped with a 3-litre water tank, the f1200 delivers up to 90 minutes of continuous steam, reducing the need for frequent refills. Perfect for steaming multiple garments, bedding, or curtains, the large tank ensures efficient and uninterrupted performance. The transparent design allows easy water level monitoring, while its removable structure makes refilling hassle-free. This capacity is ideal for homes, boutiques, or professional use, ensuring reliable, high-volume garment care. Dual Steam Settings The f1200 features dual steam settings, allowing precise control for every fabric type. Use the lower setting for delicate garments like silk, chiffon, or lace, and the higher setting for heavier materials such as wool, denim, or linen. This versatility ensures optimal wrinkle removal without damaging fabrics. Whether you’re steaming everyday shirts or high-end formalwear, the adjustable steam levels make this steamer perfect for all garment care needs. Stainless Steel Steam Panel Designed with a durable stainless steel steam panel, the f1200 ensures even heat distribution and long-lasting performance. This rust-resistant panel delivers consistent steam flow, effectively removing wrinkles and refreshing fabrics. Its smooth surface prevents fabric snags, making it safe for delicates like wedding dresses or formalwear. The premium construction ensures professional results for daily garment care or high-demand tasks like upholstery steaming. Adjustable Telescopic Pole The f1200’s telescopic pole adjusts to your preferred height, accommodating garments of all lengths, from shirts to long dresses. Made from durable stainless steel, it provides stability during use and collapses for compact storage. Ideal for home or commercial use, the adjustable pole makes steaming effortless and ergonomic. Its sturdy construction supports frequent use, ensuring a reliable solution for wrinkle-free garments, bedding, and curtains. 90 Minutes Continuous Steam With its large water tank and advanced heating system, the f1200 provides up to 90 minutes of continuous steam. This extended runtime is ideal for tackling multiple outfits, bedding, curtains, or upholstery without interruptions. Designed for efficient performance, it allows you to refresh garments and large textiles in one session, saving time and effort. Whether for home or professional use, this feature ensures uninterrupted, high-capacity fabric care. Smooth-Rolling Wheels The f1200 features smooth-rolling wheels that provide effortless mobility, allowing you to transport it easily between rooms. Whether navigating carpets, hardwood, or tiled floors, the durable wheels ensure stability and convenience. Perfect for home or boutique settings, it’s easy to reposition while steaming clothes, curtains, or upholstery. This mobility-enhancing design makes the f1200 an ideal choice for flexible, user-friendly garment care. Integrated Garment Hanger The built-in garment hanger securely holds shirts, dresses, and trousers during steaming, ensuring wrinkle removal from all angles. Designed for stability, it prevents garments from slipping or wrinkling further. Ideal for hanging long items like gowns or suits, this feature streamlines the steaming process. Whether for daily outfits or formalwear, the integrated hanger adds convenience and precision to your fabric care routine. Safe for All Fabrics From delicate silk to heavy wool, the f1200 steamer is safe for use on all fabric types. The dual steam settings provide gentle care for delicate garments while effectively removing wrinkles from thick materials. Ideal for wedding dresses, saris, curtains, and bedding, it ensures fabrics remain pristine and damage-free. Perfect for refreshing dry-clean-only items, the f1200 combines power and precision for versatile, professional garment care. Quick 35-Second Heat-Up The f1200 heats up in just 35 seconds, thanks to its 2200W heater, making it ideal for busy schedules. This rapid start allows you to tackle last-minute wrinkles on clothes or prepare multiple garments quickly. Whether you’re steaming for a special event or refreshing daily wear, the fast heat-up saves time and ensures efficient fabric care. Perfect for both small and large tasks, it’s designed to deliver professional results on demand. Compact Storage Design Despite its full-size performance, the f1200 is designed for compact storage. The collapsible telescopic pole and detachable water tank allow the unit to fit neatly in closets or storage areas. This space-saving design makes it perfect for small homes or boutiques. Whether used daily or occasionally, the f1200’s thoughtful construction ensures powerful fabric care without taking up unnecessary space in your home or workspace. Gentle on Delicates The f1200 provides gentle steam for delicate fabrics, including silk, satin, lace, and chiffon. Its adjustable settings ensure safe wrinkle removal without scorching or leaving water marks. Perfect for dry-clean-only garments, wedding dresses, or formalwear, it preserves fabric integrity while delivering professional results. Whether steaming high-end clothing or everyday wear, the f1200 ensures gentle yet effective fabric care. Refreshes Upholstery & Bedding The f1200 isn’t just for clothes; it’s perfect for refreshing upholstery, bedding, and curtains. Its powerful steam removes wrinkles, odours, and allergens from furniture, duvets, and drapes. Ideal for keeping your home fresh and clean, it’s a versatile solution for fabric care. Whether tackling sofas, cushions, or heavy curtains, the f1200 provides effective steaming for large household textiles, leaving them refreshed and wrinkle-free. Anti-Drip Steam Design The f1200’s anti-drip design ensures that only steam, not water, touches your fabrics. This feature protects delicate materials from water marks or stains, making it safe for all garment types. Whether steaming silk blouses, formalwear, or upholstery, the anti-drip system ensures consistent, clean results. Designed for precision and reliability, it ensures your fabrics are wrinkle-free without mess or fuss, making garment care stress-free. Ergonomic Handle Grip The ergonomic handle of the f1200 provides a comfortable grip, reducing hand fatigue during extended steaming sessions. Its lightweight design ensures easy manoeuvrability for tackling wrinkles on garments, bedding, or drapes. Perfect for both daily use and larger tasks, the handle’s thoughtful construction enhances control and precision. Whether steaming formalwear or heavy curtains, the f1200’s ergonomic design makes fabric care effortless and efficient. Long Insulated Steam Hose The f1200 features a long, insulated steam hose that stays cool to the touch for safe and flexible use. Ideal for steaming hard-to-reach areas, it’s perfect for refreshing long curtains, tall drapes, or large bedding items. The insulated design ensures consistent steam temperature for effective wrinkle removal, even during extended use. Whether working on garments or household fabrics, the long hose provides convenience and professional-grade results.
